exam_format: Computer-based testing (CBT), fixed-form. 100-150 questions depending on exam. Scaled scoring (390 passing out of 500).

testing_centers.provider: PSI or NHA-approved test centers / online proctoring
testing_centers.notes: Most exams are computer-based (linear fixed-form). Some available via live remote proctoring. NCCA accredited. Results often immediate or within days.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required at check-in. Must match name on registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed book. No notes, phones, or reference materials. Calculators provided on-screen if needed. Follow all test center or remote proctoring rules.
renewal_options: Every 2 years via online portal. Requires 10 continuing education (CE) credits per cycle. CE can be earned through NHA courses or approved providers. Renewal fee applies.
recommended_experience: Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency; or are scheduled to earn a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency in the next 12 months. Completed an EKG technician training or education program within the last 5 years. Provide evidence that you have successfully performed a minimum of ten (10) EKGs on live individuals. OR Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency. 1 year of supervised work experience in a EKG technician field within the last 3 years; or 2 years of supervised work experience in a EKG technician field within the last 5 years. Provide evidence that you have successfully performed a minimum of ten (10) EKGs on live individuals.

prerequisites.description: Possess a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency; or are scheduled to earn a high school diploma or GED/high school equivalency in the next 12 months
Completed an EKG technician training or education program within the last 5 years
Provide evidence that you have successfully performed a minimum of ten (10) EKGs on live individuals
1 year of supervised work experience in a EKG technician field within the last 3 years; or 2 years of supervised work experience in a EKG technician field within the last 5 years

retake_policy.notes: Full exam fee charged for each retake. No limit specified beyond waiting period.

domains.name: Patient Care and Safety During Testing

official_study_resources.title: CET Online Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: This engaging online study guide provides contemporary learning tools such as interactive games, quizzes, flashcards, and professionalism tips from experts in the field.

official_study_resources.title: CET Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Prepare for your CET certification exam with a set of three different online CET practice tests. Each practice test allows up to 2 attempts each.

official_study_resources.title: CET Preparation Package
official_study_resources.notes: This special package includes robust interactive study materials and a CET study guide, along with the CET practice test. (Best value!)

official_study_resources.title: CET Test Plan
official_study_resources.notes: This free study aide maps out key concepts you will see on the CET exam.
